articles.title: Ethereum’s Pectra upgrade revolutionises wallets with EIP-7702 smart contract integration
articles.description: 15-5-2025 – Ethereum’s Pectra upgrade has ushered in a new era of wallet functionality, with the groundbreaking EIP-7702 standard at its heart. This innovation empowers everyday Ethereum wallets to harness the power of smart contracts, seamlessly blending simplicity with sophistication. articles.title: Nasdaq-listed BTCS Inc. to boost ETH holdings with $57.8M raise
articles.description: Publicly-traded firm BTCS Inc. announced a $57. 8 million financing agreement led by investment firm ATW Partners to purchase Ether as it expands its blockchain infrastructure strategy. The Rockville, Maryland-based company announced the deal on May 14, stating that the move will allow it to expand validator node operations and build recurring revenue from Ether (ETH) staking
